label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: CHAMPOUSSIN attacked solo with 1.7km remaining from the select GC group, surprising favorites who watched each other instead of chasing.
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam drove Ineos pace despite BERNAL being designated leader, revealing team hierarchy confusion under pressure.
ROGLIČ Primož refused to initiate chase of YATES/BIZKARRA attacks, preferring to concede stage for bonus seconds preservation.
AG2R Citroen's CHAMPOUSSIN exploited hesitation in four-rider GC group by attacking 1700m out when favorites watched each other.
MÄDER Gino sacrificed podium support work for HAIG Jack, yet jumped to white jersey via breakaway positioning.
LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel abandoned mid-stage after joining regrouping chase group, signaling complete collapse under sustained Ineos tempo.

rider_signals.CHAMPOUSSIN Clément: positive: Opportunistically won from GC group by attacking when four favorites neutralized each other's chase instincts.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Set race-splitting tempo for Ineos despite BERNAL being leader, then attacked successfully to gain virtual podium.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Called for pace but failed to follow YATES attack, ultimately drifting back and losing podium position.
rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: Leveraged breakaway role to claim white jersey while still working for HAIG, exceptional dual-purpose racing.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: Abandoned race entirely after failing to sustain pace when joining chase group, complete mental/physical breakdown.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Tactically conservative, chasing only for bonus seconds rather than stage win, prioritizing TT margin management.
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: Reached final climb in podium group of four despite burning MÄDER and PADUN earlier, securing third place.
rider_signals.BIZKARRA Mikel: neutral: Attacked multiple times on final climb seeking Spanish stage win but lacked punch to sustain moves.
rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Secured KOM jersey by collecting intermediate points before peloton chase intensified, strategic breakaway management.
rider_signals.GIBBONS Ryan: positive: Solo descended Category 1 climb with 1:15 gap, nearly held off GC favorites until 3.4km remaining.
